name: batch_replicate
description: Replicate rows based on a copies field.

config_fields.name: schema
config_fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).

config_fields.name: copies_field
config_fields.description: Name of the field containing the number of copies to make

config_fields.name: default_copies
config_fields.description: Default number of copies if copies_field is missing or invalid

config_fields.name: max_copies
config_fields.description: Upper bound on copies per row to prevent unbounded replication

config_fields.name: include_copy_index
config_fields.description: Whether to add a 'copy_index' field (0-based) to each output row

name: batch_stats
description: Compute aggregate statistics over a batch of rows.

config_fields.name: schema
config_fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).

config_fields.name: value_field
config_fields.description: Name of the numeric field to aggregate (sum/mean)

config_fields.name: group_by
config_fields.description: Optional field that partitions the batch and emits one aggregate row per distinct value. The group_by field is included in each output row.

config_fields.name: compute_mean
config_fields.description: Whether to compute mean in addition to sum/count

name: field_mapper
description: Map, rename, and select row fields.

config_fields.name: schema
config_fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).

config_fields.name: required_input_fields
config_fields.description: Fields this transform requires in input. Used for DAG validation to catch missing field errors at config time. For templates, use elspeth.core.templates.extract_jinja2_fields() to discover fields.

name: json_explode
description: Explode a JSON array field into multiple rows.

config_fields.name: schema
config_fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).

config_fields.name: array_field
config_fields.description: Name of the array field to explode

config_fields.name: output_field
config_fields.description: Name for the exploded element

config_fields.name: include_index
config_fields.description: Whether to include item_index field

name: keyword_filter
description: Filter rows containing blocked content patterns.

config_fields.name: schema
config_fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).

config_fields.name: required_input_fields
config_fields.description: Fields this transform requires in input. Used for DAG validation to catch missing field errors at config time. For templates, use elspeth.core.templates.extract_jinja2_fields() to discover fields.

config_fields.name: fields
config_fields.description: Field name(s) to scan, or 'all' for all string fields

config_fields.name: blocked_patterns
config_fields.description: Regex patterns that trigger blocking

name: line_explode
description: Explode a string field into one output row per line.

config_fields.name: schema
config_fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).

config_fields.name: required_input_fields
config_fields.description: Fields this transform requires in input. Used for DAG validation to catch missing field errors at config time. For templates, use elspeth.core.templates.extract_jinja2_fields() to discover fields.

config_fields.name: source_field
config_fields.description: Name of the string field to split into lines

config_fields.name: output_field
config_fields.description: Name for each emitted line

config_fields.name: include_index
config_fields.description: Whether to include a line index field

config_fields.name: index_field
config_fields.description: Name for the emitted line index

config_fields.name: schema
config_fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).

config_fields.description: Fields this transform requires in input. Used for DAG validation to catch missing field errors at config time. For templates, use elspeth.core.templates.extract_jinja2_fields() to discover fields.

name: truncate
description: Truncate string fields to specified maximum lengths.

config_fields.name: schema
config_fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).

config_fields.name: required_input_fields

config_fields.name: fields
config_fields.description: Mapping of field names to maximum lengths

config_fields.name: suffix
config_fields.description: Suffix to append when truncating (e.g., '...'). Counts toward max length.

config_fields.name: strict
config_fields.description: If True, error when a specified field is missing (default: False)

name: azure_batch_llm
description: Batch LLM transform using Azure OpenAI Batch API.

config_fields.name: schema
config_fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).

config_fields.name: deployment_name
config_fields.description: Azure deployment name

config_fields.name: endpoint
config_fields.description: Azure OpenAI endpoint URL

config_fields.name: api_key
config_fields.description: Azure OpenAI API key

config_fields.name: api_version
config_fields.description: Azure API version

config_fields.name: template
config_fields.description: Jinja2 prompt template

config_fields.name: system_prompt
config_fields.description: Optional system prompt

config_fields.name: temperature
config_fields.description: Sampling temperature

config_fields.name: max_tokens
config_fields.description: Maximum response tokens

config_fields.name: response_field
config_fields.description: Output field name for LLM response

config_fields.name: poll_interval_seconds
config_fields.description: Batch status check interval in seconds

config_fields.name: max_wait_hours
config_fields.description: Maximum batch wait time in hours

config_fields.name: lookup
config_fields.description: Lookup data loaded from YAML file

config_fields.name: template_source
config_fields.description: Template file path for audit (None if inline)

config_fields.name: lookup_source
config_fields.description: Lookup file path for audit (None if no lookup)

config_fields.name: system_prompt_source
config_fields.description: System prompt file path for audit (None if inline)

config_fields.name: tracing
